event: Figure Calling Over a Lake at Dusk
description: A photograph taken at dusk showing a solitary figure in dark clothing standing at the end of a small wooden dock, holding a glowing oil lantern extended over the dark calm water of a large lake. Pine tree branches frame the upper left corner. The distant forested shoreline is silhouetted against a pale blue-grey twilight sky. The lantern's warm orange glow is reflected in the still water below. The overall atmosphere is deeply blue and tranquil with the single point of warm light.
